---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? What are you trying to do that you can't do today?

## Proposed Solution

How do you think this should work? Include CLI examples if applicable:

```bash
tqcli <proposed-command>
```

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered other approaches? Why is this one better?

## Context

- Which models or inference engines does this relate to?
- Which platforms (Mac/Linux/Windows)?
- Is this blocking your workflow?
